---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0003
alias: northstar_backfill_gamma
issued_on: 2025-12-23
total_eur: 530
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 185
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 105
    line_eur: 105
---
# Northstar buyer-language sprint invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0003                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_gamma      |
| issued_on      | 2025-12-23                    |
| total_eur      | 530                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 185      | 185      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
| 3 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 105      | 105      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 530      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A backfilled invoice from the period when Miles was trying to make the language sound like one product instead of three.

next_step.current_state: Invoice frontmatter added successfully. Next add bill frontmatter preserving body, then delete processed inbox item and report completion.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by running the two requested finance notes through the OCR/frontmatter workflow. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to the invoice record and the purchase bill record, preserved each original note body, and deleted the completed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap, inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS.MD files when entering folders, used OCR + migration workflows and the finance schema, preserved original note bodies, and deleted the inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked to run two finance docs through the OCR workflow. The visible contents of the two target records provided all required schema fields defined in 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, so I added YAML frontmatter to each existing file in place and preserved the original bodies per the migration workflow. After completing the request, I deleted the processed inbox file as required by the inbox workflow.
